_meta.description: Allowlisted standalone upscale pass: load an image, upscale it with a model-based upscaler (e.g. 4x-UltraSharp, 4x_foolhardy_Remacri), save. For final crispness on an already-composed image. submit fills ONLY the listed nodes; _meta stripped before POST; image_name resolves under the input dir; upscale_model in allowlist. Pairs with the maintainer's preferred HD finish: UltimateSDUpscale + SwinIR_4x at denoise ~0.25. (Note: SDXL/sd_xl_base_1.0 + SDXL/sd_xl_refiner_1.0 DO load and the base+refiner flow works — an earlier 'base fails to load' note was wrong.)

fillable.1.inputs.image: input image name (under ComfyUI input dir)
